_doc: This file governs all deterministic classification logic. Thresholds, exclusions, and behavioral flags. Validate changes with: npm run validate-config

projects._comment: Governs Jira project classification and scope decisions

inactivity._comment: Thresholds (in days) for classifying project activity status
inactivity._doc: Logic: last_issue_updated < activeDaysThreshold → active; < dormantDaysThreshold → dormant; < archiveDaysThreshold → archive; else → delete candidate. Uses the more recent of lastIssueUpdated and lastIssueCreated.

minimumIssueCounts._comment: Projects with fewer issues than these values get flagged for review regardless of activity

exclusions._comment: Projects to EXCLUDE from all analysis. Add by project key.
exclusions._doc: These projects will not appear in any report. Use for system/template projects that are known non-candidates.

waveAssignment._comment: Scoring rules for migration wave assignment. Higher score = earlier wave.
waveAssignment._doc: Wave 1 = score >= 40, Wave 2 = score 20-39, Wave 3 = score < 20, No-migrate = explicitly excluded or delete candidate

inactivity._comment: Thresholds (in days) for classifying space activity status
inactivity._doc: Same logic as projects but based on last page created/updated in the space

exclusions._comment: Spaces to EXCLUDE from all analysis. Add by space key.
exclusions._doc: Personal spaces starting with ~ are often excluded. Add system spaces here.

inactivity._comment: Thresholds (in days) for user activity classification
inactivity._doc: Based on lastLoginDate from Jira user directory. Users with no lastLoginDate are flagged as review.

deactivation._doc: These flags add users to the deactivation review list even if their login date is within threshold

groups._doc: System groups are excluded from rename recommendations. Empty/single-member groups are flagged for review.

unusedThresholds._comment: A scheme is 'unused' if it has zero project references (after virtual deletion of §3 delete candidates)

sparseUseThreshold._comment: A scheme is 'sparsely used' if referenced by fewer projects than this value
sparseUseThreshold._doc: Sparsely used schemes are candidates for consolidation, not immediate deletion

unusedThresholds._doc: Fields with fewer than this many issues having a non-null value are flagged as low-use

customFields._doc: Orphaned contexts = field contexts not associated with any project. Fields on no screens are invisible to users but still indexed.

duplicateDetection._doc: Two workflows are flagged as potential duplicates if they share identical status names AND transition names

complexityFlags._doc: These indicate Data Center-specific capabilities that require Cloud-compatible alternatives

attachments._doc: Large AND old attachments matching flagged extensions are bulk-trash candidates

cloudLimits._doc: Jira Cloud and Confluence Cloud hard limits. Items violating these must be fixed pre-migration.

apps._doc: Apps in dataStoringCategories require data migration planning. UI-only apps can often be swapped or dropped.

sections._comment: Enable or disable individual report sections
